title: Drinking game
wikitext:
[]: Drinking game! Post by konfunoodle » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:11 am Well im heading off to WA for my 21 bday(i use to live there not too long ago) and i'm showing my friend Eva 1.01 cuz he has not seen it yet. I am planning a drinking game to go along with the movie. Any ideas out there? My ideas consist 1 shot/beer for: -when an angel appears - Shinji cries -shinji runs away im asking for other ideas to make this fun, not opinions on how this sounds like a bad idea.

[]: Post by Uriel Septim VII » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:24 am One shot for every time someone says "AT-Field".

[]: Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:29 am So I'm fond of this game. How about we toss in "anta baka" as a word to drink at as well?

[]: Post by ZapX » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:40 am http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=4993
